remember: Explain the importance of physical fitness and exercise in daily life.
List the three main components of physical fitness.
Identify the different types of sports and their characteristics.
understand: Describe the relationship between nutrition and physical performance.
Explain the concept of macronutrients and their role in the body.
Discuss the importance of hydration and electrolytes during exercise.
apply: Design a training program for a specific sport or activity.
Develop a meal plan for optimal nutrition before, during, and after exercise.
Create a schedule to manage time effectively for sports and academic activities.
analyze: Analyze the impact of different types of exercise on physical fitness and health.
Evaluate the effectiveness of various nutrition strategies for improving performance.
Compare and contrast different sports and their physical demands.

ncert_objectives: Explain the concept of physical fitness and its components.
Discuss the importance of nutrition and hydration in sports performance.
Describe the characteristics of different sports and their requirements.
board_exam_objectives: Explain the importance of physical fitness and exercise in daily life.
Describe the relationship between nutrition and physical performance.
Design a training program for a specific sport or activity.
